subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! Today there are souls renowned and mentioned in the Abhá Kingdom and the Supreme Dominion that shine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله الیوم نفوسی در ملکوت ابهی و جبروت اعلی مذکور و معروف که مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @being a source of light; guidance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
